name: Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 10.5 oz can cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onion, butter or margarine, potatoes, ham, corn, cream of mushroom soup, and milk in a Crock-Pot.
2. Cover and cook on High for 4 to 5 hours.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Garnish with parsley flakes before serving.
Serves 8
